title: TW's Ore Dredging
description: Enhance your mining experience! This adds reasonable and abundant drops to rocks, as well as hidden mysterious relics!
body:
# TW's Ore Dredging

This mod aims to enrich your mining experience in multiple ways, adding more surprises and possibilities to every dig!

---

## Cimelia (Treasures)

In this mod, when breaking various rocks, in addition to dropping vanilla ores, there is a **chance to drop even more precious and exciting treasures**. We call them **Cimelia**.

Each cimelia has **one or more unique and powerful functions**, and we will continue to update with more interesting content!

---

## Block Crushing

Currently, **most rocks and ores in the Overworld** will have more special drops.

### 📋 Drop Mechanics

Each time you mine certain blocks, you have a **25% chance to shatter it**.

When shattered, it will no longer drop its original loot, but instead drop new additional loot – possibly **crushed block piles** or some **minerals and treasures** buried within.

---

## Special Mining Tools

### Geological Hammer

The Geological Hammer is a specialized pickaxe that excels at crushing rocks. When used to break blocks that support the crushing mechanic, it guarantees a **100% chance to shatter** the block (instead of the usual 25%).

After shattering, the hammer also increases your chance of obtaining extra drops – including ores and cimelia.

> ⚒️ Tip: The Geological Hammer is crafted like a standard pickaxe but uses unique materials (see in-game recipe). It inherits all the abilities of a pickaxe, making it a reliable companion for any mining expedition.

### Crumble Hammer

The Crumble Hammer is a powerful tool that requires charging to break blocks. To use it, right-click and hold while aiming at a target block. Energy accumulates over time – once the stored energy matches the block's hardness, the block is instantly destroyed, accompanied by a spectacular burst of particles and sound.

Like the Geological Hammer, it guarantees a **100% crush chance** on any crushable block and further increases the probability of additional drops.

---

## Crushed Products

### Rock Piles

Rock Piles are the main product after rocks are shattered in this mod.

Except for **Sandstone Rock Piles**, all other rock piles can be used to craft the corresponding **stone bricks**, or be broken down into **four corresponding pebbles**.

### Pebbles

- Can be used as a **substitute for flint** when crafting arrows.
- Can be thrown as **projectiles** to deal damage to enemies.
- Each type of pebble has **different characteristics**: some fly faster, some deal more damage, some have a shorter attack cooldown – wait for you to discover!

> 💥 The projectile damage of pebbles is affected by the **Strength effect**: each level of Strength increases the damage by 1 point. They will be your trusty companion in the early stages of mining!

Rock piles and pebbles also **generate naturally in the world**, decorating your environment.

---

## Mineral Pouches

To handle the large number of drops, this mod adds **three tiers of Mineral Pouches**, which are extremely practical!

### 🎒 Crafting and Upgrade Path

| Pouch | Materials |
|-------|------------|
| **Leather Mineral Pouch** | Leather + String |
| **Chain Mineral Pouch** | Rabbit Hide + Chain (upgrade from previous tier) |
| **Phantom Mineral Pouch** | Phantom Membrane + Slimeball (upgrade from previous tier) |

### ✨ Exclusive Enchantments

Three incredibly useful enchantments for mineral pouches:

- **Convergence (Level I)**: Automatically compresses mineral nuggets in the pouch into corresponding raw ores or ingots.
- **Auto Picking (Level I)**: When you pick up mineral items from the ground, they are automatically stored into the pouch.
- **Expansion (Levels I–III)**: Each level increases the pouch's capacity by 0.5 times, and the effect stacks!

---

> 🛠️ For a more detailed description of the mod, please visit the [Wiki](https://github.com/666daji/Ore-Dredging/wiki)!
